conventions.walls: finished paint surface to paint surface, above baseboard
conventions.datums: measured from drywall corners, not standing positions

rooms.great_room: kitchen + living, open combined plan; front door enters at kitchen
rooms.guest_bedroom: the tour's 'Bonus Room' — actually a guest bedroom; TWO openings (entry + doorway to the jack-and-jill secondary bath); a 3D printer occupies floor space (occlusion)
rooms.secondary_bath: the tour's 'Guest Bath' — jack-and-jill, shared with the guest bedroom
rooms.small_hall: short hall off the main hallway leading into the master suite
rooms.master_bath: off the master suite (via small hall/bedroom)
rooms.master_closet: walk-through off the master bath — NOT FILMED (invisible to every pipeline layer; laser is the only truth source)

measurements.name: sightline_front_door_to_back_door
measurements.note: front door (in kitchen) straight to back door

measurements.name: front_door_to_hallway_edge
measurements.note: to the hallway edge between guest bath and bonus room; interpretation confirmed by closure with the two other sightline segments (sum matches full sightline within 0.8in)

measurements.name: ceiling_height_all
measurements.note: validates the 9.0 ft ceiling-scale anchor used for all 1112 VSLAM scale: error +0.12%

measurements.name: secondary_bath
measurements.note: jack-and-jill; shower WITH CURTAIN inside measuring 4'10 x 2'7-29/32 (58 x 31.9 in) — curtain occludes the wall from any camera

measurements.name: great_room_edge_to_edge
measurements.note: CONFIRMED complete diagonal: front-door corner to the back corner (the one with the speaker and the couch — the same sectional from the furniture metrology test). Wall-parallel extents not yet measured

measurements.name: master_bath
measurements.note: has a shower nook (extends beyond the 6 ft width — explains the pano width over-span)

measurements.name: kitchen_counter_run
measurements.note: counter run length x counter height; 36in standard prior was +2.9% off

pending: great room (kitchen+living combined): overall extents both directions + diagonal

door opening WIDTHS + position from nearest corner
kitchen back wall to counter/island front edge (kitchen zone depth)
guest bath tub length (60in standard check), vanity widths, window widths
